title: Signup via welcome screen routes user to profile setup
description: Verifies a new user can start from welcome, sign up with email/password, and is taken into onboarding.

steps.description: Fill New Test User into the full name field
Fill newuser+auth1@example.com into the email field
Fill ValidPassword123! into the password field
Verify the user lands on the profile setup screen

title: Login routes user into the app when credentials are valid
description: Verifies a returning user can log in with valid credentials and is routed to the app entry destination.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the home screen or profile setup screen

title: Login shows invalid credentials error for wrong password
description: Verifies the login form surfaces an authentication error when credentials are incorrect.

steps.description: Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill WrongPassword123! into the password field
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Signup navigation path works from welcome to signup screen
description: Verifies the welcome screen can route the user to the signup screen reliably.

steps.description: Verify the signup form is displayed

title: OTP flow: request OTP from signup and navigate to OTP screen
description: Verifies a user can enter a phone number for OTP and proceed to the OTP entry screen.

steps.description: Fill a valid phone number into the phone number field
Wait for the OTP entry screen to load
Verify the OTP code entry form is displayed

title: OTP verification shows error for invalid or expired code
description: Verifies OTP verification fails with an on-screen error when an invalid code is entered.

steps.description: Fill 000000 into the OTP code field
Verify an invalid or expired code error is visible

title: Login form validation prevents submit when required fields are empty
description: Verifies required field validation appears and blocks progress when attempting to submit an empty login form.

steps.description: Verify validation errors are visible for required fields

title: Ride Search: Search rides by source, destination, and date and view results
description: Verifies a user can search with source, destination, and date and sees ride cards in the results.

steps.description: Type a valid source location into the source field and select a suggestion from autocomplete
Type a valid destination location into the destination field and select a suggestion from autocomplete
Select a valid date from the calendar
Verify a list of ride cards is displayed

title: Ride Search: Open ride details from a search result
description: Verifies a user can perform a search and navigate to a ride details view by selecting a ride card.

steps.description: Type a valid source location into the source field and select a suggestion from autocomplete
Type a valid destination location into the destination field and select a suggestion from autocomplete
Select a valid date from the calendar
Tap a ride card in the results list
Verify ride details are displayed including driver info, price, and available seats

title: Ride Search: Empty state shown for incomplete or mismatched locations
description: Verifies submitting a search with incomplete or mismatched locations shows an empty state with suggested actions.

steps.description: Type an incomplete or nonspecific source location into the source field without selecting an autocomplete suggestion
Type an incomplete or nonspecific destination location into the destination field without selecting an autocomplete suggestion
Select a valid date from the calendar
Verify an empty state is displayed indicating no rides were found with suggested next steps

title: Ride Search: Prevent search when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the search cannot be submitted when required fields are missing and validation feedback is shown.

steps.description: Type a valid source location into the source field and select a suggestion from autocomplete
Select a valid date from the calendar
Verify a validation error is visible for the missing destination and results are not shown

title: Ride Search: Change date and re-run search updates results state
description: Verifies changing the date and submitting search again refreshes the results state accordingly.

steps.description: Type a valid source location into the source field and select a suggestion from autocomplete
Type a valid destination location into the destination field and select a suggestion from autocomplete
Select a valid date from the calendar
Select a different valid date from the calendar
Verify the results state updates after the second search submission

title: Load My Bookings and view upcoming bookings
description: Verifies that an authenticated passenger can open My Bookings and see the upcoming list content area.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify upcoming bookings are displayed or an empty state is visible

title: Load My Bookings and view past bookings
description: Verifies that an authenticated passenger can switch to the past bookings list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify past bookings are displayed or an empty state is visible

title: Open booking details from a booking card
description: Verifies that tapping a booking from My Bookings opens its booking detail page with core details visible.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Tap a booking from the list

title: Start cancellation flow requires providing a reason
description: Verifies that the cancel booking flow enforces entering a reason before confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Tap a booking from the list
Attempt to confirm cancellation without providing a reason
Verify a cancellation reason validation error is visible

title: Cancel a booking with a valid reason
description: Verifies that a passenger can cancel a booking by providing a reason and sees the booking marked as cancelled.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Tap a booking from the list
Fill Cancelled due to changed plans into the cancellation reason field
Verify the booking status is updated to cancelled

title: Restricted-window cancellation shows an error state
description: Verifies that attempting to cancel a booking within the restricted window results in an error message and does not mark the booking cancelled.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Tap a booking from the list
Fill Need to change plans into the cancellation reason field
Verify a cancellation restriction error is visible

title: Open chat with driver from booking detail
description: Verifies that a passenger can initiate chat with the driver from booking details and land on a chat screen.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Tap a booking from the list
Choose to chat with the driver
Verify the chat conversation view is displayed

title: Load profile page and display primary profile content
description: Verifies the profile page loads and shows core profile information such as stats and vehicle/verification sections.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify vehicle information and verification status are displayed

title: Edit profile name and save changes
description: Verifies the user can navigate to edit profile, update their name, save, and see the updated name on the profile page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill New Test Name into the name field
Verify New Test Name is displayed on the profile page

title: Logout from profile
description: Verifies the user can log out from the profile screen and is returned to an unauthenticated entry screen.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the welcome or login screen

title: Update vehicle information in edit profile
description: Verifies the user can update vehicle-related fields in edit profile and the updated values appear on the profile page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill Test Model X into the vehicle model field
Fill TEST-1234 into the vehicle plate field
Fill Blue into the vehicle color field
Verify Test Model X is displayed in vehicle information
Verify TEST-1234 is displayed in vehicle information

title: Attempt to save edit profile with required fields cleared
description: Verifies client-side validation prevents saving when required profile fields are missing.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a required field validation error is visible
Verify the profile changes are not saved

title: Edit profile photo upload error handling (oversized/unsupported)
description: Verifies an error is shown when attempting to upload an invalid profile photo (too large or unsupported type) and the save is blocked.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Upload an invalid profile photo (unsupported type or too large) into the profile photo field
Verify an upload validation error with guidance is visible
Verify the profile photo is not updated

title: Load documents page and display verification status
description: Verifies the documents page loads and shows the current document verification status and upload slots.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify document upload sections for driving license and vehicle RC are displayed
Verify the current verification status is displayed

title: Submit documents for verification and see pending status
description: Verifies the user can upload the required document photos and submit a verification request that results in a pending status in the UI.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Upload a valid driving license front photo
Upload a valid driving license back photo
Upload a valid vehicle RC photo
Verify the verification status is pending

title: Reject unsupported or too-large document upload
description: Verifies the UI shows an error when uploading an unsupported file type or too-large document, without submitting.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Upload an invalid document file (unsupported type or too large) into one of the document upload fields
Verify a file validation error is visible
Verify submission for verification is not allowed

title: Prevent submission when required document photos are missing
description: Verifies the user cannot submit for verification until all required document photos are provided.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Upload a valid driving license front photo
Verify a missing required documents validation error is visible
Verify the verification status does not change to pending

title: Load notifications page and display notification list with unread state
description: Verifies the notifications page loads and shows a list of notifications with read/unread indicators.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a list of notifications is displayed
Verify unread/read status indicators are displayed for notifications

title: Open a notification and mark it as read
description: Verifies tapping a notification marks it as read and the unread count decreases if present.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click a notification item that is currently unread
Verify the selected notification is marked as read
Verify the unread count decreases or the unread badge is reduced

title: Clear all notifications from the feed
description: Verifies the user can clear all notifications and sees an empty state afterwards.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the clear all notifications action
Confirm the clear action if a confirmation prompt is shown in-app
Verify an empty state message is visible for notifications

title: Admin dashboard loads for an admin user
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can access the admin dashboard and see core stats/panels.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify admin dashboard stats are displayed

title: Non-admin user cannot access admin dashboard
description: Verifies a logged-in non-admin user is blocked from the admin area via access denied or redirect.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user is redirected away from the admin area or shown an access denied state

title: Admin can navigate to Users management and view user list
description: Verifies the admin can open the users management screen and see a list of users.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a users list or table is displayed

title: Admin can search/filter users
description: Verifies searching users updates the visible results on the Users screen.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill "test" into the user search field
Verify the users list updates to reflect the search criteria

title: Admin can ban a user from the users list
description: Verifies an admin can ban a user and the UI reflects the updated user status.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a user from the users list
Trigger the ban action for the selected user
Verify the selected user shows a banned status or the ban action is no longer available

title: Admin can unban a user from the users list
description: Verifies an admin can unban a user and the UI reflects the updated user status.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a banned user from the users list
Trigger the unban action for the selected user
Verify the selected user shows an unbanned status or the ban action is available again

title: Admin documents screen loads and pending documents are visible
description: Verifies the admin can open the document verification screen and see pending items or an empty state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a pending documents list is displayed or an empty state is visible

title: Admin can approve a pending document (UI confirmation)
description: Verifies the admin can open a pending document and approve it with a visible success outcome.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a pending document item from the list
Verify a success confirmation is visible or the document status is updated in the UI

title: Admin can view SOS monitoring screen and resolve an alert when available
description: Verifies the SOS monitoring page loads and allows resolving an alert if one is present, otherwise shows an empty state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
If an active SOS alert is present, open it and resolve it
Verify the SOS screen shows either no active alerts or that the resolved alert is no longer in the active list

title: Admin can open rides moderation screen and force cancel a ride when available
description: Verifies the rides management page loads and supports force-cancel if a ride is listed, otherwise shows an empty state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
If a ride is present, open it and trigger the force cancel action
Verify the rides list reflects the cancellation or shows no active rides for that entry
